privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Odoo CRM dataset with 4 opportunities: 2 linked to Belgian partners (Waffle Iron Bulk Order, Logistics Software Upgrade) and 2 linked to US partners (Cloud Server Migration, Fleet Tracking System). The expected tagging scheme maps Belgium opportunities to 'Region: Europe' tag and US opportunities to 'Region: North America' tag. All opportunity names and regional mappings are created via Odoo's XML-RPC API in setup_task.sh and exported for verification in export_result.sh.
